videos.description:
John Medeski: Organ
Kenny Grohowski: Drums
Matt Hollenberg: Guitar 
John Zorn: Composer, Conductor 

From the latest Simulacrum release 49 Acts Of Unspeakable Depravity In The Abominable Life And Times Of Gilles De Rais. Such a bone-chilling title!
